## What changed

<!-- One or two sentences. -->

## Lane

- [ ] Stays within my file-ownership lane (see SQUAD_DOCTRINE)
- [ ] No edits to another agent's lane (filed an issue instead if needed)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes (coverage ≥ 60% on `src/services/`)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run demo` and `npm run smoke` pass
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (for behavioral or packaging changes)
